channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Temporary traffic lights, 9th June
item.description:
Temporary lights have been in place for days with nothing being worked on.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brampton Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frant Close, Penge, Greater London

item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (offensive)

item.title: Vegetation, 9th June
item.description:
Overhanging vegetation

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 111, Hayes Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thorny bush is overflowing onto pathway, 9th June
item.description:
A thorny bush needs trimming. It is overflowing onto the pathway leading from the Croydon Road entrance to the canal. Dogs and small children could be pricked by the thorns while walking along the path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Cranleigh Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wheelie bins left on pavement, 9th June
item.description:
These wheelie bins are constantly left on the pavement despite there being plenty of space around the flats in Ruskin walk. They are often blocking the pavement making disabled access very difficult & dangerous.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ruskin Walk, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping - trolley, 9th June
item.description:
Shopping trolley dumped on road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 9th June
item.description:
This car has been abandoned on our street for over three weeks now. Flat tyre on the front left, so wouldn't now be drivable. Vehicle is currently taxed but still needs removing from the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bullbanks Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of trolleys, 9th June
item.description:
Three trolleys dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 15, 9th June
item.description:
Drain is blocked with dirt and silt

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Leigh Street, King's Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bicyle chained to lamppost 16 on Parkhill Road, 9th June
item.description:
A bicycle is chained to the lamppost and has been abandoned for at least two or three weeks. The tyres are going flat, it's covered in cobwebs, and it's being left out in the rain.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Parkhill Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road Surface breaking up., 9th June
item.description:
In southbound bus lane, south of Tesco. Ridge of broken up tarmac covering half the width of lane. Concern for cyclist or motorbike.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 190, Camden Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 9th June
item.description:
General household waste. Two sofa pieces and other rubbish.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rushworth Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress and bin overflowing, 9th June
item.description:
Occupants of who live on the road but have an address in Upper Wickham Lane dumped their mattress against the wall then drove. It was dumped at 1:40am on the 6/6/26. Its people like them that bring down the area!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Coton Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missed bin collection, 9th June
item.description:
Hackney recycling keeps missing our recycling bins collection

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several bags of rubbish and rubble, 9th June
item.description:
This flytipping appeared on the shared alley next to no. 66. It looks like builders waste and gardening waste.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodbrook Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
